My Coworker Be Losing His Fucking Mind Bro, also known as 9 Hour Work Day Drawing, refers to a viral pen drawing made by a coworker of X / Twitter user @paid90forGG that was shared by them on the platform. Originally posted in January 2022, the drawing has since achieved cult status on X, being used as an exploitable meme format and its caption also being reused as a catchphrase.

On January 6th, 2022, X[1] / Twitter user @paid90forGG posted a photograph of a pen drawing supposedly made by their coworker. The drawing depicts a stressed...
